CREATE TABLE json_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data JSON);
SELECT json.filter(data, '$..price') FROM json_data WHERE id = 1;
SELECT json.filter(data, '$..price') FROM json_data WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT json.filter(data, '$.items[*].name') FROM json_data WHERE id < 3;
SELECT id, json.filter(data, '$..price') AS prices FROM json_data ORDER BY prices;
SELECT id, json.filter(data, '$..price') AS prices FROM json_data WHERE json.filter(data, '$..price') IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id INT PRIMARY KEY, json_info JSON);
SELECT json.filter(o.json_info, '$..product_price') FROM orders o JOIN json_data j ON o.order_id = j.id WHERE j.id = 1;
SELECT json.filter(o.json_info, '$.products[*].product_price') FROM orders o WHERE json.filter(o.json_info, '$.products[*].product_price') IS NOT NULL;
SELECT o.order_id, json.filter(o.json_info, '$..product_price') AS product_prices FROM orders o WHERE o.order_id > 0 ORDER BY product_prices;
